interests.title: Pink skater
interests.description: I spend my free time improving my roller and ice skating skills at the Axel Sports Club.

interests.title: Female cyclist
interests.description: As soon as it gets warm, I ride my pink comet to work and uni. My personal record is 126 km.

interests.title: Crochet grandma
interests.description: This is the stage when you start buying ergonomic crochet hooks. PS. The best ones are Addi Swing.

interests.title: Geometry & PRL figures
interests.description: There's something satisfying about shapes that don't try to be anything other than themselves.

interests.title: Avant-garde cinema enthusiast
interests.description: As a fan of unconventional films, I seek out the strangest ones that immerse me in extraordinary worlds.

contact.heading: Let’s chat!
contact.description: I’m currently looking for a UX/UI Designer role where design decisions are grounded in real user needs and accessibility is taken seriously. Beyond project work, knowledge sharing matters — through workshops, talks, and conversations about accessibility and design.

socialMedia.heading: Social Media
socialMedia.description: You can meet me at conferences MacMeeting. If any project caught your attention or you’d like to connect, feel free to reach out — always open to a quick chat or exchanging ideas. I speak Polish and English.
